01 — THE BASE
01 THE BASE

Some houses are just houses. His somehow became headquarters. Most of the Goon Squad memories started there — random evenings, movie nights, pointless arguments, silence, chaos, and moments that slowly became part of our lives.

02 — THE LORE

We Don’t Have Many Photos.
But We Have the Memories.

Somewhere between “bro we should take a pic” and actually never taking one, these moments happened. Fully real. Mostly undocumented. The Goon Squad archive is mostly stored in our heads — which is honestly the superior storage method. No cloud needed. No storage full warnings. Just vibes, forever.

03 — CHARACTER ARCHIVE
03 POKÉMON ENERGY

A dog lover, Pokémon addict, and the definition of calm energy. Loyal, genuine, and effortlessly cool without ever trying too hard.

04 BADRI SURVIVAL ARC

Special respect to Badri — probably the most patient human alive for surviving this nonchalant creature every single day while somehow being his complete opposite.

05 THE THINKER

While the rest of us reacted first and thought later, he was always the one who actually thought. Calm decisions, lowkey observations, and somehow always understanding situations better than everyone else.

06 THE RECOMMENDER

One recommendation from him and the entire group is binge-watching something at 2AM. Every pick becomes a whole group experience. Exhibit A and B:

DEXTER
JOJO’S BIZARRE ADVENTURE

Memory Timeline

27 JULY 2024
The First Outing
The very first time the Goon Squad stepped out together. Something clicked that day and everyone knew it.
18 DECEMBER 2024
The Base Opens
His house officially becomes Goon Squad headquarters. It never really closed after that.
2025
The Prithi Homie Arc
We were dealing with Prithi homie. A whole arc on its own. Enough said.
2026
Pokémon Obsession: Final Form
The Pokémon addiction reached its absolute peak. No one was safe from the recommendations.
2026 — NOW ❖
The College Arc Begins
A new chapter. The nonchalant main character steps into the biggest arc yet.
— OUR JOURNEY

Technically, We Have Photos.
Sort Of.

We have them. Somewhere. Probably. The point is — the memories exist and they live rent-free in our heads, which is honestly the superior storage method. But fine, here’s the evidence we managed to scrape together.

GOON SQUAD ARCHIVES
A Message
From The Squad
KEEP SCROLLING ↓

A MESSAGE FROM THE GOON SQUAD

NOW PLAYING

Happy Birthday to the most nonchalant person we know.

It’s honestly crazy how someone so lowkey and chill became the main reason this whole group feels complete.

Your house was never just a house to us — it somehow became the central base of the Goon Squad. Most of our best memories started there: random hangouts, late-night talks, pointless laughs, movie marathons, chaos, silence, and moments that looked normal at the time but slowly became unforgettable.

You’ve always had that calm aura about you. While the rest of us react first and think later, you’re usually the one who actually thinks. Quietly observing everything, making the right decisions, staying unbothered — and somehow still understanding everyone around you.

You introduced us to things that somehow became part of our conversations for weeks. Every recommendation ends up being a whole experience for the group. And your love for dogs and Pokémon honestly explains your personality perfectly.

Special respect to Badri — probably the most patient person alive for surviving your nonchalant energy every single day.

Now you’re stepping into a completely new chapter with college life ahead of you, and the entire Goon Squad genuinely wishes you nothing but happiness, growth, peace, and success.

We hope you meet good people, make unforgettable memories, and succeed in everything you choose to do.

Stay lowkey. Stay genuine. Stay unforgettable.
Happy Birthday, brother 🤍

The Base Member
Now Starts
A New Chapter.

The Goon Squad wishes you a life filled with peace, growth, success, and moments that always stay true to who you are.

Happy Birthday, brother
